steps.title: Mark the concession
steps.content: The word Granted concedes that Palau Mornau's dramatic features could not literally belong in a forest. The next sentence pivots back to the point that natural influences are still visible.

steps.title: Reject the wrong relations
steps.content: Choice A adds in the same direction instead of conceding and pivoting. Choice C signals similarity. Choice D signals restatement. None captures the contrast between the concession and the natural-design evidence.

steps.title: Use the contrast transition
steps.content: Choice B means nevertheless or even so, so it correctly introduces the observation that Ferrer's curves and plant- and animal-inspired flourishes still show natural influence. The answer is B.
